title: eleusine scindica
intro: Eleusine scindica, also known as Indian goosegrass or Eleusine, is a type of grassy plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Eleusine scindica include the treatment of various health conditions such as digestive issues, kidney stones, and skin problems. The herbal preparations of Eleusine scindica typically involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from the leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various health issues.
